Name: GRASS_TYPE_PARAM_ST
Description: Dynamic instanced assets, combined with a flat or billboard texture. Used to generate scattered grass or other such arrangements without the need for manual placement.

Fields.Name: LOD 0: Cluster Type
Fields.Description: The LOD0 cluster type this grass asset belongs to.

Fields.Name: LOD 1: Cluster Type
Fields.Description: The LOD1 cluster type this grass asset belongs to.

Fields.Name: LOD 2: Cluster Type
Fields.Description: The LOD2 cluster type this grass asset belongs to.

Fields.Name: Base Density
Fields.Description: The base density value for the grass clumping.

Fields.Name: Model Name
Fields.Description: The grass model to define the parameters for.

Fields.Name: Flat Texture Name
Fields.Description: The flat texture ID to use for this grass asset.

Fields.Name: Billboard Texture Name
Fields.Description: The billboard texture ID to use for this grass asset.

Fields.Name: Effect of Tilt %
Fields.Description: The percentage of tilt that is applied to the grass asset based on its normal map.

Fields.Name: Maximum Tilt Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum percentage of tilt that can be applied to the grass. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Tilt Angle Jitter
Fields.Description: The amount of jitter to apply to the tilt angle for this grass asset. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Width Scale: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum width scale to apply to the grass asset.

Fields.Name: Width Scale: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum width scale to apply to the grass asset.

Fields.Name: Height Scale: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum height scale to apply to the grass asset.

Fields.Name: Height Scale: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum height scale to apply to the grass asset.

Fields.Name: 1: Multiplication Color: R
Fields.Description: The red element of this color for multiplication color 1.

Fields.Name: 1: Multiplication Color: G
Fields.Description: The green element of this color for multiplication color 1.

Fields.Name: 1: Multiplication Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue element of this color for multiplication color 1.

Fields.Name: 2: Multiplication Color: R
Fields.Description: The red element of this color for multiplication color 2.

Fields.Name: 2: Multiplication Color: G
Fields.Description: The green element of this color for multiplication color 2.

Fields.Name: 2: Multiplication Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue element of this color for multiplication color 2.

Fields.Name: Flat Texture: Plane Separation
Fields.Description: The plane separation type to use for this grass asset's flat texture.

Fields.Name: Flat Texture: Number of Planes
Fields.Description: The number of planes to use for this grass asset's flat texture.

Fields.Name: Flat Texture: Plane Angle
Fields.Description: The angle of this grass asset's flat texture from the asset's position.

Fields.Name: Flat Texture: Plane Distance
Fields.Description: The distance of this gtass asset's flat texture from the asset's position.

Fields.Name: Cast Shadow
Fields.Description: Whether this grass asset will cast a shadow.

Fields.Name: Wind Amplitude
Fields.Description: The amplitude to apply to any wind force that affects this grass asset.

Fields.Name: Use Dummy Polygon Direction
Fields.Description: Adjust the angle of the plane to the dummy polygon's direction.

Fields.Name: Wind Speed
Fields.Description: The speed to apply to any wind force that affects this grass asset.

Fields.Name: Orientation Direction
Fields.Description: Determines the orientation direction for this grass asset. -1 for random orientation.

Fields.Name: Orientation Range of Direction
Fields.Description: Determines the range for the orientation direction parameter.

Fields.Name: Simple Model Name
Fields.Description: The model ID to use the simple representation of this grass asset.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD Range ID
Fields.Description: The grass LOD range parameter to use for this grass asset.

Fields.Name: Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to apply to this grass asset when generated.
